summary: Completed comprehensive testing of notification system - all backend APIs and frontend components working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications list and unread_count
POST /api/notifications/check - verifies alerts and generates notifications
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks individual notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read
Notification bell component visible in sidebar after login
Notification panel opens when clicking bell
Notification panel shows list of 5 notifications with details
Mark as read button works on individual notifications
Mobile responsive design - bell switches between sidebar and header
Mobile notification panel positioning and functionality
VAPID keys properly configured for push notifications
